summary: iter297 backend-only testing: notification preferences (GET/PUT with role gating), biometric health dashboard (structure + offline detection + 403 for cashier), biometric device models/update/test-probe, and shift-close no-exception path. All 11 new tests pass + 27 regression tests (biometric_auto_sync 9, biometric_iter295_extras 3, biometric_zk_all_models 5, biometric_iter296 2, expense_shift_isolation 4, lazy_shift_and_daily_isolation 4) all pass. Total 38/38 green.
critical_code_review_comments: notification_prefs_routes.py imports HTTPException from server but also from fastapi at top — harmless but noisy alias `_H` unused.
biometric_health totals dict is missing 'completed' (present per-branch queue but not aggregated). Not a bug per spec, but consider adding for symmetry.
PUT /system/notification-preferences: sending only unknown keys returns 400 (good), but empty {} would also 400 — acceptable.
seed_data_creation: Created + deleted transient BIO-TEST-* devices during test runs. Notification prefs restored to defaults at end of test_put_notification_prefs_accepts_valid_rejects_unknown.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter297 = 38/38 (11 new + 27 regression). Endpoints: GET/PUT /api/system/notification-preferences (admin/manager only), GET /api/biometric/health (?branch_id, ?offline_after_minutes). Shift-close via POST /api/cash-register/close schedules background report + integrity check without blocking. WhatsApp/Email actual delivery not tested (channels not configured in preview — expected).
